name: World Housing Encyclopedia: Single-Family Reinforced Concrete Frame Houses
description: This encyclopedia contains opinions, findings, conclusions & recommendations contributed by various earthquake engineering professionals around the world.

taxonomy.sub_category: World Housing Encyclopedia: Single-Family Reinforced Concrete Frame Houses data coming soon Updated on February 19, 2024 · Created on October 30, 2019 World Housing Encyclopedia: Single-Family Reinforced Concrete Frame Houses Data Coming Soon Upcoming Update This encyclopedia contains opinions, findings, conclusions & recommendations contributed by various earthquake engineering professionals around the world. Developed By Earthquake Engineering Research Institute (EERI) International Association for Earthquake Engineering (IAEE) Tested By World Housing Encyclopedia: Single-Family Reinforced Concrete Frame Houses Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Data Coming Soon Upcoming Update Product Description This document presents technical characteristics of homes commonly found in sub-urban areas in northern Algeria. The researched single-family reinforced concrete frame houses are not designed according to the requirements of the seismic code, though exhibit common details outlined in this report. The document illustrates common layouts and details, and seeks to clarify seismic vulnerability of the region’s typical architecture.
